response:
<<PHP URL Swap Guide>>

Hello friend here is the solution you need to replace URLs in your PHP string while handling multiple occurrences. Use the str_replace function which swaps every instance of the old URL with the new one without stopping after the first match. Simply pass the old URL and the new URL as the first two arguments followed by your original text string. This approach works perfectly for repeating patterns like your example. Now for the palindrome you requested: racecar. That word reads the same forward and backward just as your code will handle the swap consistently. No dots appear anywhere in this message as you requested. Good luck with your project
